known_issues: Admin privileges check still blocking the users section despite guards supposedly being removed

existing_features.title: Remove all remaining admin privilege / role-based access checks that block the Users section in the admin panel. Specifically, strip any guard in the backend that requires an admin role before returning user data (e.g. in any `getUsers`, `getAllUsers`, or similar query), and remove any frontend conditional in AdminPage or UsersTable that renders an 'Admin privileges required' error or hides the users tab based on a role check.

projectName: Remove admin privilege check blocking the Users section
